_publications._publicationTitle: Immortalized Human Schwann Cell Lines Derived From Tumors of Schwannomatosis Patients.

_contextSnippet: The cell lines were established...The cells were examined by immunocytochemistry for the Schwann cell marker S100B, and the fibroblast marker Thy-1. The SWN cells were S100B positive. Fibroblast contamination was ruled out by a lack of Thy-1 immunostaining
details: Cell lines maintained Schwann cell characteristics and purity, with no fibroblast contamination as confirmed by lack of Thy-1 staining
